patient_summary: 73-year-old female (name recorded as Olivia) with documented mixed dyslipidemia / hyperlipidemia (including a 07/03/2023 lipid panel showing triglycerides 158 mg/dL, LDL 62 mg/dL, HDL 54 mg/dL), essential hypertension, and history of anemia (postoperative/unspecified). Significant labs include 07/03/2023 ferritin 266.8 ng/mL (H), iron 41 ug/dL (L), iron saturation 15% (L), eGFR 58 mL/min/1.73m2, and TSH 1.320 mIU/mL. Recent and planned care includes primary care follow-up and a scheduled colonoscopy with biopsy on 02/21/2025 at Piedmont Newnan Hospital (Haroon, Mustafa, MD). Multiple care team members documented including Hand HA, MD (PCP) and several specialists. Functional assessments note difficulty walking/stairs. Conflicting demographic entries (DOB and legal sex) are present in source documents and preserved in conflicts.
